title: Design and implement a task-replay system
prompt: Design and implement a task-replay system that allows an operator to re-run a completed task from its persisted run artifact. The system should reconstruct the initial task context from the artifact and submit a new task with the same plan. Include a new API endpoint POST /api/tasks/{id}/replay and update the frontend operator UI.

rubric.notes: Complex multi-surface greenfield feature. DAG decomposition required. Spec mandatory. Multiple skills expected.
